about: I’m Tarapada Garai, a dedicated full-stack developer with six months of experience in building responsive, user-friendly web applications. I began as a front-end developer, creating clean and engaging UIs, and have since expanded into backend development to build complete, scalable solutions.
What sets me apart is my ability to integrate AI features into real-world projects.
Projects: Google Keep Clone (AI-generated note titles), Instagram Clone (AI-generated bios and captions).
I use AI effectively in full-stack projects to improve user experience and productivity. I enjoy solving real-world problems and collaborating on innovative ideas.

experiences.name: Animesh Dey
experiences.feedback: Tarapada truly exceeded my expectations. He listened carefully, understood my vision, and brought it to life flawlessly.

experiences.name: Animesh Maji
experiences.feedback: Very creative and professional. Delivered a modern, fast, and user-friendly website.

experiences.name: Santanu Dutta
experiences.feedback: Hard to find such professional developers. Built exactly what I imagined.

experiences.feedback: Anticipated everything and added extra value to the project.

experiences.name: Teaching Experience
